lines.gurmukhi: ਟੋਡੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ttoddee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Todee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਹਜ ਸੂਖ ਮਨਿ ਉਪਜਿਓ ਕੋਟਿ ਸੂਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਰਗਾਸ ॥੨॥੫॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: saant sehaj sookh man upajio kott soor naanak paragaas |2|5|24|
lines.english: Peace and tranquility, poise and pleasure, have welled up within my mind; millions of suns, O Nanak, illuminate me. ||2||5||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਵਨ ॥
lines.translit: har har patit paavan |
lines.english: The Lord, Har, Har, is the Purifier of sinners;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਦਰੁ ਸੁਘੜੁ ਚਤੁਰੁ ਸਭ ਬੇਤਾ ਰਿਦ ਦਾਸ ਨਿਵਾਸ ਭਗਤ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਨ ॥
lines.translit: sundar sugharr chatur sabh betaa rid daas nivaas bhagat gun gaavan |
lines.english: He is beautiful and wise, clever and all-knowing. He dwells within the hearts of His slaves; His devotees sing His Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਮਾਨ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਮਨ ਕੋ ਭਾਵਨ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeea praan maan sukhadaataa antarajaamee man ko bhaavan | rahaau |
lines.english: He is the soul, the breath of life, the Giver of peace and honor, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts; He is pleasing to my mind. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਰੂਪ ਅਨੂਪ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕਰਮ ਭੂਮਿ ਬੀਜਨ ਸੋ ਖਾਵਨ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: niramal roop anoop suaamee karam bhoom beejan so khaavan |1|
lines.english: His form is immaculate and pure; He is the incomparable Lord and Master. Upon the field of actions and karma, whatever one plants, one eats. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਜੀਵਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਸਦਾ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਵਨ ॥੨॥੬॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: rasanaa simar simar jas jeevaa naanak daas sadaa bal jaavan |2|6|25|
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on His Praises with my tongue, I live; slave Nanak is forever a sacrifice to Him. ||2||6||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸਮਨ ਬਿਸਮ ਭਏ ਬਿਸਮਾਦਾ ਆਨ ਨ ਬੀਓ ਦੂਸਰ ਲਾਵਨ ॥
lines.translit: bisaman bisam bhe bisamaadaa aan na beeo doosar laavan |
lines.english: I am amazed, and wonder-struck by His wonder. There is none other than Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਈ ਮਾਇਆ ਛਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: maaee maaeaa chhal |
lines.english: O my mother, Maya is so misleading and deceptive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਣ ਕੀ ਅਗਨਿ ਮੇਘ ਕੀ ਛਾਇਆ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਭਜਨ ਬਿਨੁ ਹੜ ਕਾ ਜਲੁ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: trin kee agan megh kee chhaaeaa gobid bhajan bin harr kaa jal | rahaau |
lines.english: Without meditating on the Lord of the Universe, it is like straw on fire, or the shadow of a cloud, or the running of the flood-waters. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਟੋਡੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ttoddee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Todee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੋਡਿ ਸਿਆਨਪ ਬਹੁ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ਦੁਇ ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ਸਾਧ ਮਗਿ ਚਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhodd siaanap bahu chaturaaee due kar jorr saadh mag chal |
lines.english: Renounce your cleverness and all your mental tricks; with your palms pressed together, walk on the Path of the Holy Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਮਾਨੁਖ ਦੇਹ ਕਾ ਇਹੁ ਊਤਮ ਫਲੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: simar suaamee antarajaamee maanukh deh kaa ihu aootam fal |1|
lines.english: Remember the Lord, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts; this is the most sublime reward of this human incarnation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਬਖਿਆਨ ਕਰਤ ਸਾਧੂ ਜਨ ਭਾਗਹੀਨ ਸਮਝਤ ਨਹੀ ਖਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: bed bakhiaan karat saadhoo jan bhaagaheen samajhat nahee khal |
lines.english: The Holy Saints preach the teachings of the Vedas, but the unfortunate fools do not understand them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਰਾਚੇ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਦਹਨ ਭਏ ਮਲ ॥੨॥੭॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: prem bhagat raache jan naanak har simaran dehan bhe mal |2|7|26|
lines.english: Servant Nanak is absorbed in loving devotional worship; meditating in remembrance on the Lord, one's dirt is burnt away. ||2||7||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਦੇਵੈ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਕੋਟਿ ਫਲਾ ਦਰਸਨ ਗੁਰ ਡੀਠੇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: vaddai bhaag devai paramesar kott falaa darasan gur ddeetthe | rahaau |
lines.english: By great good fortune, the Transcendent Lord has blessed me with them. Millions of rewards come from the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਈ ਚਰਨ ਗੁਰ ਮੀਠੇ ॥
lines.translit: maaee charan gur meetthe |
lines.english: O mother, the Guru's feet are so sweet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਟੋਡੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ttoddee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Todee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸਥਿਰ ਭਏ ਸਾਚ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਬਾਹੁਰਿ ਨਹੀ ਪੀਠੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: asathir bhe saach rang raate janam maran baahur nahee peetthe |1|
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Love of the True Lord become permanent and eternal; birth and death do not grind them down any more. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਤ ਅਚੁਤ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਮਦ ਢੀਠੇ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaavat achut abinaasee kaam krodh binase mad dteetthe |
lines.english: Singing the Glorious Praises of the imperishable, indestructible Lord, sexual desire, anger and stubborn pride vanish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਭਜਨ ਰੰਗ ਰਸ ਜੇਤੇ ਸੰਤ ਦਇਆਲ ਜਾਨੇ ਸਭਿ ਝੂਠੇ ॥
lines.translit: bin har bhajan rang ras jete sant deaal jaane sabh jhootthe |
lines.english: Without the Lord's meditation, all joys and pleasures are totally false and worthless; by the Kind Mercy of the Saints, I know this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਰਤਨੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਹੂਨ ਚਲੇ ਸਭਿ ਮੂਠੇ ॥੨॥੮॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: naam ratan paaeo jan naanak naam bihoon chale sabh mootthe |2|8|27|
lines.english: Servant Nanak has found the jewel of the Naam; without the Naam, all must depart, cheated and plundered. ||2||8||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਟੋਡੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ttoddee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Todee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਭੇਟਿਓ ਬਡਭਾਗੀ ਜਾ ਕੋ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa bhettio baddabhaagee jaa ko ant na paaraavaaraa |
lines.english: I have met the True Guru, by great good fortune; He has no end or limitation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਚਿਤਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasang har har naam chitaaraa |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I contemplate the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜਿ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਅੰਕੁਰੁ ਭਲੋ ਹਮਾਰਾ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj anand hovai din raatee ankur bhalo hamaaraa | rahaau |
lines.english: I am in peaceful poise and bliss, day and night; the seed of my destiny has sprouted. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੁ ਗਹਿ ਕਾਢਿ ਲੀਓ ਜਨੁ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਬਿਖੁ ਸਾਗਰ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kar geh kaadt leeo jan apunaa bikh saagar sansaaraa |1|
lines.english: Taking His humble servant by the hand, He pulls him out of the poisonous world-ocean. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਕਾਟੇ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਸੰਕਟ ਦੁਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran kaatte gur bachanee bahurr na sankatt duaaraa |
lines.english: Birth and death are ended for me, by the Word of the Guru's Teachings; I shall no longer pass through the door of pain and suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਨਿ ਗਹੀ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕੀ ਪੁਨਹ ਪੁਨਹ ਨਮਸਕਾਰਾ ॥੨॥੯॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: naanak saran gahee suaamee kee punah punah namasakaaraa |2|9|28|
lines.english: Nanak holds tight to the Sanctuary of his Lord and Master; again and again, he bows in humility and reverence to Him. ||2||9||28||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਅਨੰਦ ਰਾਜ ਸੁਖੁ ਭੁਗਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਸਭ ਦੁਖੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kott anand raaj sukh bhugavai har simarat binasai sabh dukh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I enjoy the ecstasy of millions of princely pleasures; remembering the Lord in meditation, all pains have been dispelled. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਈ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਕੋ ਸੁਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: maaee mere man ko sukh |
lines.english: O my mother, my mind is at peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਟੋਡੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ttoddee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Todee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਨਾਸਹਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਪਾਵਨ ਤਨ ਮਨ ਸੁਖ ॥
lines.translit: kott janam ke kilabikh naaseh simarat paavan tan man sukh |
lines.english: The sins of millions of lifetimes are erased, by meditating on the Lord; becoming pure, my mind and body have found peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰਿ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਅਸਟ ਮਹਾ ਸਿਧਿ ਕਾਮਧੇਨੁ ਪਾਰਜਾਤ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰੁਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: chaar padaarath asatt mahaa sidh kaamadhen paarajaat har har rukh |
lines.english: The four great blessings, the eight supernatural spiritual powers of the Siddhas, the wish-fulfilling Elysian cow, and the wish-fulfilling tree of life - all these come from the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਿ ਸਰੂਪੁ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਭਈ ਆਸਾ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਭੇਟਤ ਉਤਰੀ ਭੁਖ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dekh saroop pooran bhee aasaa darasan bhettat utaree bhukh |1|
lines.english: Gazing upon the Lord's form of perfect beauty, my hopes have been fulfilled; attaining the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, my hunger has been appeased. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਨਿ ਗਹੀ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਫਿਰਿ ਗਰਭ ਨ ਧੁਖੁ ॥੨॥੧੦॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: naanak saran gahee sukh saagar janam maran fir garabh na dhukh |2|10|29|
lines.english: O Nanak, holding tight to the Sanctuary of the Lord, the ocean of peace, you shall not suffer the pains of birth and death, or fall into the womb of reincarnation again. ||2||10||29||
